parameters-en.Rate: Controls the rate or speed of the filter step sequence. Has no affect if Pattern is set to "Off."
parameters-en.Pattern: Selects one of 20 different filter sequence patterns. When set to "Off," the LFO can be used.
parameters-en.Envelope: Controls the envelope of all 8 filters. Low values result in choppy steps with a fast attack and slower release. High values result in choppy steps with a slower attack and fast release. Values in the middle result in smoother steps with a noticeably slower attack and release, almost like a tremolo. Has no affect if Pattern is set to "Off."
parameters-en.Voice: Determines whether the 8 filters' fixed frequencies are optimized for Bass ("Bass") or Guitar ("Mid").
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Output: Sets the overall output level of the effect.
parameters-en.Drive: Controls the input level into the filter section. Higher settings can overdrive the filters, resulting in a bit of (perhaps pleasing) distortion.
parameters-en.Direction: When on, reverses direction of the filter step sequence pattern. Has no affect if Pattern is set to "Off."
parameters-en.LFO: Controls the speed of the LFO that . Has no affect unless Pattern is set to "Off."
parameters-en.Level 1: Controls the level of the lowpass filter fixed at 110 Hz (Voice set to "Bass") or 200 Hz (Voice set to "Mid").
parameters-en.Level 2: Controls the level of the resonant filter fixed at 160 Hz (Voice set to "Bass") or 300 Hz (Voice set to "Mid").
parameters-en.Level 3: Controls the level of the resonant filter fixed at 240 Hz (Voice set to "Bass") or 450 Hz (Voice set to "Mid").
parameters-en.Level 4: Controls the level of the resonant filter fixed at 350 Hz (Voice set to "Bass") or 675 Hz (Voice set to "Mid").
parameters-en.Level 5: Controls the level of the resonant filter fixed at 525 Hz (Voice set to "Bass") or 1 kHz (Voice set to "Mid").
parameters-en.Level 6: Controls the level of the resonant filter fixed at 775 Hz (Voice set to "Bass") or 1.5 kHz (Voice set to "Mid").
parameters-en.Level 7: Controls the level of the resonant filter fixed at 1.2 kHz (Voice set to "Bass") or 2.2 kHz (Voice set to "Mid").
parameters-en.Level 8: Controls the level of the resonant filter fixed at 1.8 kHz (Voice set to "Bass") or 3.4 kHz (Voice set to "Mid").
